name: Team RWBY: The Huntresses and the Saiyan
description:
(REQUEST!) While landing on a random planet to practice your new Super Saiyan 4 transformation after helping Goku defeat Baby on Earth, you are found by Team RWBY as they recently graduated as Huntresses at Atlas.

(Why SS4 and not God? Because that transformation needs more love and I'm biased.)

https://alphacoders.com/author/view/24360
creator: Jack4884
